title: Cost Impact
description: GPU-hours lost to failures, estimated dollar cost, and the preventable fraction where pre-failure signals were detectable.

list.name: gpu_cost_per_hour
list.label: GPU Cost ($/hr)
list.description: Dollar cost per GPU per hour. Default: $2.00 (A100 spot-ish rate).

panels.title: GPU-Hours Lost per Failure Category (30d)
panels.description: gpu_count × elapsed_seconds / 3600 aggregated by failure category.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  failure_category AS "Category",
  ROUND(SUM(gpu_count * elapsed_seconds / 3600.0)::numeric, 1) AS "GPU Hours Lost"
FROM job_events
WHERE failure_category IS NOT NULL
  AND state != 'COMPLETED'
  AND end_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
GROUP BY failure_category
ORDER BY "GPU Hours Lost" DESC

panels.title: Total Cost Impact
panels.description: Sum of all GPU-hours lost × $/hr variable. Does not include downstream research time lost.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND(
    SUM(gpu_count * elapsed_seconds / 3600.0) * ${gpu_cost_per_hour}
  ::numeric, 2) AS total_cost_usd
FROM job_events
WHERE failure_category IS NOT NULL
  AND state != 'COMPLETED'
  AND end_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'

panels.title: Preventable Cost
panels.description: Cost from failures where a DCGM pre-failure signal was detected — these could have been avoided with proactive node cordon.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND(
    SUM(je.gpu_count * je.elapsed_seconds / 3600.0) * ${gpu_cost_per_hour}
  ::numeric, 2) AS preventable_cost_usd
FROM job_events je
WHERE je.failure_category IS NOT NULL
  AND je.state != 'COMPLETED'
  AND je.end_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM correlation_results cr
    WHERE cr.job_id = je.job_id
      AND cr.signal_detected = true
  )

panels.title: Preventable Fraction
panels.description: What percentage of the total dollar cost could have been avoided if nodes were cordoned on first signal.

targets.rawSql:
WITH all_cost AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(gpu_count * elapsed_seconds / 3600.0), 0) AS total
  FROM job_events
  WHERE failure_category IS NOT NULL AND state != 'COMPLETED'
    AND end_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
),
preventable AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(je.gpu_count * je.elapsed_seconds / 3600.0), 0) AS prev
  FROM job_events je
  WHERE je.failure_category IS NOT NULL AND je.state != 'COMPLETED'
    AND je.end_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM correlation_results cr
      WHERE cr.job_id = je.job_id AND cr.signal_detected = true
    )
)
SELECT
  ROUND(
    100.0 * preventable.prev / NULLIF(all_cost.total, 0)
  ::numeric, 1) AS preventable_pct
FROM all_cost, preventable

panels.title: Daily GPU-Hours Lost (30d)
panels.description: Day-by-day breakdown of GPU compute hours lost to failures.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_trunc('day', end_time) AS time,
  failure_category,
  ROUND(SUM(gpu_count * elapsed_seconds / 3600.0)::numeric, 1) AS gpu_hours
FROM job_events
WHERE failure_category IS NOT NULL
  AND state != 'COMPLETED'
  AND end_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1
